---
format: html
title: prepare_decomposition_fold_input()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>prepare_decomposition_fold_input</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Prepare Decomposition Fold Input</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Rebuilds model input for one route and one train/test split using
fold-local response filtering and train-only predictor scaling.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>prepare_decomposition_fold_input(
  route = NULL,
  inputs = NULL,
  train_ids = NULL,
  test_ids = NULL
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="route">route</code></td>
<td>
<p>One-row route data frame or named list.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="inputs">inputs</code></td>
<td>
<p>List returned by 'load_decomposition_diagnostic_inputs()'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="train_ids">train_ids</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character vector of training sample row names.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="test_ids">test_ids</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character vector of test sample row names.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>Named list with training input, test input, test observations, and
fold diagnostics.
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
